Activepieces

Open-source no-code automation platform alternative to Zapier

7/10Overall Rating
8/10Ease of Use
FreeStarting Price
2022Founded
Free Plan Available

About Activepieces

Activepieces is a ai automation platform founded in 2022. It positions itself as “Open-source no-code automation platform alternative to Zapier” and is best suited for startups, developers, budget conscious teams. Pricing starts at Free, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Visual BuilderYes
Code SupportYes
Api ConnectionsYes
SchedulingYes
Conditional LogicYes
Error HandlingYes
Team CollaborationYes
TemplatesYes
Webhook SupportYes
Ai ActionsNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Fully open-source and self-hostable
  • Clean modern UI
  • Growing rapidly with active community

Cons

  • Fewer integrations than established players
  • Relatively new and evolving
  • Limited enterprise features
